basic_details.job_title: Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 35 PGT & TGT Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website of Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess Master’s Degree/Bachelor’s Degree/B.Ed/CTET/B.P.Ed qualification are eligible to apply for these Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) vacancies. The offline application process for Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) Recruitment 2026 has started and

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 50% marks + B.Ed, Bachelor's degree with 50% marks + B.Ed + CTET Paper II, B.P.Ed with 50% marks
qualification.details: Guest PGT Physics: Master's degree with at least 50% marks in Physics/Electronics/Applied Physics/Nuclear Physics (with Physics at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT Islamiat: Master's degree in Islamic Studies with at least 50% marks (with Islamic Studies at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT Islamic Studies: Master's degree in Islamic Studies with at least 50% marks (with Islamic Studies at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT English: Master's degree in English with at least 50% marks (with English at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT Home Science: Master's degree in Home Science with at least 50% marks (with Home Science at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT Chemistry: Master's degree in Chemistry/Biochemistry with at least 50% marks (with Chemistry at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT Urdu: Master's degree in Urdu with at least 50% marks (with Urdu at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT Biology: Two years Integrated Post Graduate M.Sc. in concerned subject OR Master's degree with at least 50% marks in Botany/Zoology/Life Science/Bio Science/Genetics/Micro Biology/Bio Technology/Molecular Bio/Plant Physiology (with Botany and Zoology at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT Economics: Master's degree in Economics/Applied Economics/Business Economics with at least 50% marks (with Economics at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT Commerce & Business Studies: Master's degree in Commerce with at least 50% marks (with Commerce at graduation level). Guest PGT Sociology: Master's degree in Sociology with at least 50% marks (with Sociology at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest PGT Computer Science: M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT)/MCA with at least 50% marks OR M.E. or M.Tech. (Computer Science/IT) with at least 50% marks, and B.Ed. Degree or equivalent. Guest PGT Mathematics: Master's degree in Mathematics/Applied Mathematics with at least 50% marks (with Mathematics at graduation level) and B.Ed degree. Guest TGT Mathematics: Four Years Integrated degree course OR Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in Mathematics and Physics, Chemistry, Electronics, Computer Science, Statistics (any two) and B.Ed. Pass CTET Paper II. Proficiency in teaching Hindi and English medium. Guest TGT English: Four Years Integrated degree course OR Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in English (as a subject in all three years) and B.Ed. Pass CTET Paper II. Guest TGT S.St: Bachelor's degree with at least 50% marks in History, Geography, Economics and Political Science (any two, one must be History or Geography) and B.Ed. Pass CTET Paper II. Guest TGT Science (Bio/Chem): Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in Biology or Chemistry and B.Ed. Pass CTET Paper II. Guest TGT Science: Bachelor's degree with at least 50% marks in Biology or Chemistry and B.Ed. Pass CTET Paper II. PET TGT Physical Education Teacher (PET): Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed) with at least 50% marks or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) posts is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Guest Teachers?
faq.answer: There are a total of 35 vacancies for Guest Teacher (PGT & TGT) posts announced by Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for PGT posts?
faq.answer: For PGT posts, a Master's degree with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed degree are generally required, with specific subject requirements.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification for TGT posts?
faq.answer: For TGT posts, a Bachelor's degree with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed degree, along with CTET Paper II, are generally required.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Guest Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Teacher posts will be on a pay per period basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Teacher posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School?
faq.answer: Jamia Girls Senior Secondary School is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110025.
